mapper.insert: insert into work_order_status_config(status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{statusCode}, #{statusName}, #{statusType}, #{color}, #{sortOrder}, #{isInitial}, #{isFinal}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_status_config set status_code = #{statusCode}, status_name = #{statusName}, status_type = #{statusType}, color = #{color}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_initial = #{isInitial}, is_final = #{isFinal}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_status_config where id = #{id}
select id, status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_status_config where status_code = #{statusCode}
select id, status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_status_config order by sort_order asc

select id, status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_status_config where enabled = 1 order by sort_order asc
select id, status_code, status_name, status_type, color, sort_order, is_initial, is_final, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_status_config where is_initial = 1 limit 1
